Tiny inflate algorithm and PNG/APNG image decoding implementations with licenses and build scripts.

## Folders
- **[tinflate](tinflate/README.md)**: License agreement, tiny inflate algorithm implementation, header file, and build script for tinflate.
- **[uPNG](uPNG/README.md)**: C implementation and build script for decoding PNG/APNG images with license terms and header definitions.
